## Buggy RTL extracted from prompt
```verilog
module TopModule(
    input  [7:0]    A,
    output [15:0]   B
    );

//*************code***********//

    assign B = (A<<8)-(A<<2)+A;
//*************code***********//

endmodule
```

## Current candidate RTL
```verilog
module TopModule(
    input  [7:0]    A,
    output [15:0]   B
    );

//*************code***********//

    assign B = (A<<8)-(A<<2)+A;
//*************code***********//

endmodule
```

## What to do
- Identify the logic bug relative to the spec.
- Output a corrected full `TopModule` implementation.
